description:
## Step 3 — Create your first Customer Wallet

Wallets are auto-created when you save a new Customer (if the option is on in Wallet Settings), or you can create one manually here.

A wallet is unique per **(Customer, Currency)**. Most customers need just one wallet in your default currency, but multi-currency customers will have multiple.

**What to fill in:**
- **Customer** — pick any existing customer
- **Currency** — defaults to the customer's currency
- **Status** — leave as Active
- **Credit Limit** — optional soft cap for warnings

Click Save. Balance starts at zero. You'll fund it in the next step.
name: Create First Customer Wallet
title: Create First Customer Wallet
